SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE DIVIDENDS DIV SET DIV.CREATED = 'Y' , DIV.DIV_REPORT_ID = ${param.reportId} WHERE DIV.CREATED = 'N' AND DIV.DIV_CO_NUMBER IN ( SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
